data.title: California Man Sentenced for Role in Cryptocurrency Scam
data.description:
A 22-year-old man from Newport Beach, Evan Tangman, has been sentenced to 70 months in federal prison for laundering money for a fraudulent group. According to ChainCatcher, the group, known as the 'crypto kids,' used social engineering tactics, such as impersonating cryptocurrency exchange employees, to steal over $263 million in cryptocurrency from investors. Tangman admitted to laundering at least $3.5 million for the group, receiving luxury cars like Lamborghinis and Porsches as payment. Federal agents seized a black 2022 Rolls-Royce Ghost, valued at over $300,000, and a Porsche GT3 RS from his residence.

The group, which included teenagers, spent the stolen funds on renting mansions and private jets, purchasing luxury goods, and spending up to $500,000 in a single nightclub outing. Tangman also instructed others to destroy digital devices after the arrest of group members.

data.title: International crude oil prices rose, with WTI crude oil reaching $111.
data.description: According to Gate.com data, both WTI and Brent crude oil prices rose briefly, with WTI crude oil touching $111 per barrel, up 0.74% on the day. Brent crude oil climbed above $112 per barrel, rising more than 1% on the day.

data.title: Bitget has launched USDT-based AIGENSYN and PROS perpetual contracts, supporting up to 20x leverage.
data.description: According to an official announcement, Bitget has launched USDT-margined AIGENSYN and PROS perpetual contracts, both with a maximum leverage of 20x. Contract trading bots will also be available simultaneously.

data.title: CBA Economist: Central Banks Must Maintain Credibility Amid Inflation Concerns
data.description: On April 30, CBA's Chief Economist Luke Yeaman emphasized the importance of central banks maintaining policy credibility in light of ongoing energy supply disruptions and rising inflation expectations, regardless of the developments in the Iran conflict. According to Jin10, the Reserve Bank of Australia has already demonstrated its anti-inflation stance this year and is expected to raise interest rates by 25 basis points in May. However, Yeaman noted that some committee members may still be concerned about the downside risks to economic growth, suggesting that the May decision could be closely contested.

data.title: Aftermath Finance to Compensate Users Following Recent Attack
data.description: Aftermath Finance, a Sui liquid staking protocol, announced that users are expected to receive full compensation within the next 48 to 72 hours. According to Foresight News, the protocol suffered an attack yesterday, resulting in a loss of approximately $1.14 million.

data.title: Altman stated that confidence in UBI has weakened, and WLD has fallen by more than 98% from its peak.
data.description: In a podcast, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman stated that his belief in Universal Basic Income (UBI) has weakened, and he is more inclined to distribute the benefits of AI through methods such as "collective ownership." Meanwhile, the token WLD of the crypto project World (formerly Worldcoin), which he champions, is currently priced at approximately $0.25, a drop of over 98% from its all-time high of $11.82 in March 2024. Data shows that the World Foundation previously sold approximately 239 million WLD tokens, raising about $65 million.

data.title: BIO rose above $0.041, up more than 23% on the day.
data.description: According to OKX data, BIO rose above $0.041 and is currently trading at $0.0409, up more than 23% on the day.

data.title: Rakuten Wallet Enables XRP Conversion and Transactions for Users
data.description: RippleX, the development lab of Ripple, announced that starting today, users of Japan's Rakuten Wallet can convert Rakuten Points into XRP. According to Foresight News, this feature allows users to conduct spot trading within the app and make direct purchases at over 5 million merchants using Rakuten Pay.

data.title: BITHUMB will launch MEGA Korean Won.
data.description: According to the official announcement, BITHUMB will launch MEGA Korean Won pairs.

data.title: Cambricon Surges Nearly 13%, Becomes A-Share Stock King Again
data.description: Cambricon's stock experienced a significant rise of nearly 13% in trading, boosting its market value to over 670 billion yuan. According to NS3.AI, the stock reached a record high of 1,595.88 yuan per share, surpassing Yuanjie Technology to reclaim its position as the leading A-share stock.

data.title: Meme Sector Sees Gains as Dogecoin Rises 7.40%
data.description: The Meme sector experienced a notable increase of 3.89% over the past 24 hours, according to SoSoValue data. Dogecoin led the gains with a rise of 7.40%. Meanwhile, major tokens showed mixed performance, with Bitcoin declining by 0.30% and Ethereum falling by 0.87%. According to NS3.AI, these fluctuations highlight the ongoing volatility within the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Binance to Suspend Shentu Network Transactions for Upgrade
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform will temporarily suspend deposits and withdrawals of tokens on the Shentu (CTK) network starting approximately on 2026-05-19 at 12:00 (UTC). This suspension is to facilitate a network upgrade and hard fork aimed at enhancing user experience. The upgrade is scheduled to occur at block height 29,367,500, which is expected to be reached around 2026-05-19 at 13:00 (UTC).

The trading of tokens on the Shentu network will remain unaffected during this period. Binance assures users that it will manage all technical requirements associated with the upgrade. Once the network is confirmed to be stable post-upgrade, deposits and withdrawals will be reopened. Binance has stated that no further announcements will be made regarding the reopening of these services.

data.title: Metaplanet Faces Major Financial Test Amid Bitcoin Holdings
data.description: PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter). Metaplanet's Asian division is undergoing a significant financial challenge as it holds 40,177 bitcoins, acquired at a total cost of approximately $4.18 billion. The company is currently facing an unrealized loss of around $490 million. Additionally, its stock price has retreated more than 83.5% from its historical peak, and its market capitalization stands at about $2.8 billion, which is now less than the value of its bitcoin holdings. The question remains whether Metaplanet can withstand this financial pressure.

data.title: US media: Trump will be briefed on new action plans against Iran on Thursday, including a strong strike and partial control of the Strait of Hormuz.
data.description: Two sources familiar with the matter said that Trump plans to be briefed on Thursday by U.S. Central Command Commander Brad Cooper on new plans for potential military action against Iran. This briefing indicates that Trump is seriously considering resuming large-scale military operations to break the deadlock in negotiations or deliver a decisive blow before ending the war. Three sources said that Central Command has prepared a plan for a “short but powerful” strike against Iran, potentially including targets on infrastructure. The expectation is that Iran will subsequently show greater flexibility on its nuclear program and return to the negotiating table. Another option expected to be presented to Trump is controlling portions of the Strait of Hormuz to restore commercial shipping. One source said such an operation could involve ground troops. Another option, previously discussed and likely to be presented in the briefing, is conducting special forces operations to secure control of Iran’s highly enriched uranium stockpile. Cooper briefed Trump similarly on February 26, two days after the U.S. and Israel launched their war against Iran. A person close to Trump said that briefing was what prompted Trump’s decision to go to war. (Jinshi)

data.title: April Stock Rally in India Faces Skepticism Amid Rupee Decline
data.description: The April rally in Indian stocks is facing skepticism as investors question its sustainability. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting concerns over the lack of conviction in the market's upward movement. Meanwhile, the Indian rupee has hit another record low, adding to the economic challenges. Analysts suggest that the stock market's performance may be influenced by global economic factors and domestic policy decisions. The rupee's decline is attributed to various pressures, including inflation and geopolitical tensions. Investors are advised to remain cautious as the market navigates these uncertainties.

data.title: International oil prices rose, with Brent crude increasing by 2%.
data.description: According to Gate data, Brent crude futures rose 2% to $112.672 per barrel, while WTI crude futures rose nearly 2% to $109.64 per barrel, the highest level since April 7.

data.title: Whale Trader Opens 80,000 ETH Long Position Worth $182 Million on Hyperliquid
data.description: An anonymous whale trader has initiated a substantial long position of 80,000 ETH, valued at $182 million, on the Hyperliquid platform. According to NS3.AI, on-chain analyst ai_9684xtpa revealed that this trader has accumulated a total long position of 120,000 ETH over the past two months, resulting in a trading profit of $44.61 million.

data.title: U.S. President Trump to Review New Military Plans Against Iran
data.description:
U.S. President Donald Trump is set to receive a briefing from U.S. Central Command Commander Brad Cooper on Thursday regarding new plans for potential military action against Iran, according to Jin10. The briefing indicates Trump's serious consideration of resuming large-scale military operations to break the negotiation deadlock or deliver a decisive blow before ending the conflict. Three informed sources revealed that the Central Command has prepared a plan for a 'swift and powerful' strike against Iran, potentially targeting infrastructure. The expectation is that Iran will then show greater flexibility on nuclear issues and return to the negotiating table.

Another plan expected to be presented to Trump involves controlling parts of the Strait of Hormuz to restore commercial shipping access. A source mentioned that such actions might include ground forces. Additionally, a previously discussed option that may be raised in the briefing is conducting special forces operations to secure Iran's high-enriched uranium reserves. Cooper had previously briefed Trump on February 26, and two days later, the U.S. and Israel launched a war against Iran. A person close to Trump stated that it was that briefing that led to Trump's decision to go to war.

data.title: The crypto market saw mixed results, with the meme sector rising nearly 4% while BTC fell to $76,000.
data.description: On April 30th, according to SoSoValue data, the cryptocurrency market saw mixed performance, with the Meme sector performing relatively well, rising 3.89% in the last 24 hours. Specifically, Dogecoin (DOGE) rose 7.40%, BUILDon (B) rose 9.16%, and SPX6900 (SPX) and Siren (SIREN) rose 3.87% and 4.84% respectively. Meanwhile, Bitcoin (BTC) fell 0.30% to $77,000, and Ethereum (ETH) fell 0.87%, remaining above $2,200. Other notable sectors included: AI, which rose 1.11% in the last 24 hours, with SkyAI (SKYAI) surging 27.53%; and Layer 2, which rose 0.19%, with Arbitrum (ARB) rising 2.97%. In other sectors, the PayFi sector fell 0.12%, but Trust Wallet (TWT) rose 0.95%; the Layer 1 sector fell 0.39%, while Aptos (APT) surged 4.75% intraday; the CeFi sector fell 0.55%, with Bitget Token (BGB) remaining relatively strong, rising 1.08%; and the DeFi sector fell 1.06%, while Terra Luna Classic (LUNC) bucked the trend, rising 8.83%. Crypto sector indices reflecting historical performance show that the ssiMeme, ssiMAG7, and ssiSocialFi indices rose 3.28%, 0.81%, and 0.59%, respectively.

data.title: Cambricon's stock price hit a new high, with its market capitalization exceeding 670 billion yuan.
data.description: Cambricon's stock price surged nearly 13% intraday, breaking through 1595.88 yuan per share, a new all-time high, and its market capitalization exceeded 670 billion yuan. Previously, Cambricon's stock price surpassed that of Yuanjie Technology, making it the new A-share market's top-performing stock. (Jinshi)
